Roofing prices are driven by roof area, so we don't fake a verdict without it. Enter your address (we measure from satellite) or your known roof size below for the price check — we already extracted the scope and red flags from your quote.

Next steps before you sign
Confirm tear-off scope — old shingles fully removed, not layered over
Ask for a written decking replacement allowance (e.g. "first 2 sheets included")
Verify drip edge, ice & water shield, and starter strip are itemized
Ask if the warranty covers materials AND workmanship, and for how long
Confirm permit and disposal are included in the price
Compare 2-3 roofing quotes side by side

What to look for on a roofing quote

A roofing quote should tell you exactly what's coming off, what's going on, and what's getting replaced in between. The biggest pricing gaps between contractors usually come down to tear-off scope, underlayment type, and flashing work — not the shingle brand.
